chunks.title: About Nidhi
chunks.text: I'm an AI/ML engineer who bridges research and production — building systems that are robust, explainable, and ready to ship. I specialise in computer vision, robotics automation, and RAG-based document intelligence. I'm always looking for systems that need automating so colleagues aren't bogged down by repetitive manual work. AI is an incredible tool for translating human cognitive abilities — pattern recognition, fault detection, classification — into scalable systems.

chunks.title: Education
chunks.text: M.Sc. in Information Technology from the University of Stuttgart, Germany (2019–2022). B.E. in Electrical & Electronics Engineering from Ramaiah Institute of Technology, Bangalore (2013–2017).

chunks.title: Skills & Tech Stack
chunks.text: Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, YOLOv8, LangChain, RAG, ROS/ROS2, Docker, C++, n8n, Kuka Robotics, Jetson Nano, FastAPI, React, OpenCV, NumPy. Strong in building production ML pipelines, computer vision systems, IoT integrations, and AI-powered workflow automation.

chunks.title: AI/ML Engineer at Escarda Technologies
chunks.text: AI/ML Engineer at Escarda Technologies, Berlin, Germany (Jan 2023 – Sep 2024). Led algorithm development for autonomous weed detection achieving 92% accuracy, reducing chemical usage by 40%. Delivered Smart Checkpot — an IoT plant monitor using YOLOv8 + Raspberry Pi. Standardised Agile sprint processes and CI/CD pipelines across the engineering team.

chunks.title: AutoDoc — Workflow Documentation Platform
chunks.text: Production-grade workflow documentation platform (Nov 2025 – Feb 2026). A Chrome MV3 extension captures clicks, DOM events, and throttled screenshots — piped through a NestJS backend and FastAPI AI service to auto-generate step-by-step guides with PII redaction, PDF export, and embeddable iframes. Tech: Chrome Extension, NestJS, FastAPI, Gemini AI, Next.js, Docker.

chunks.title: Lumen — RAG Document Intelligence
chunks.text: Lumen is a chat-with-your-documents app (Mar 2026 – Present). Drop a PDF, paste a URL, or connect a Google Drive folder — Lumen chunks and retrieves relevant excerpts, then answers questions with inline citations. Runs on free LLMs via OpenRouter with an automatic model fallback chain (Llama → Gemma → Mistral). Tech: FastAPI, React, OpenRouter, RAG, Google Drive API, Vercel, Railway.

chunks.title: Projection Mapper — Real-time Projection Mapping Tool
chunks.text: Desktop tool for real-time projection mapping onto physical surfaces (Oct 2025 – Jan 2026). Load images or video, drag four corner handles to warp perspective via live homography, layer multiple surfaces, and save/restore quad configurations as JSON presets. Tech: Python, PySide6, OpenCV, NumPy, Homography.

chunks.title: How I work
chunks.text: I care about reliability, explainability, and practical delivery. I don't ship AI without guardrails: validation, deterministic fallbacks, monitoring, and clear failure modes. If something is unknown, I say so and route it correctly. I look for systems that need automating and eliminate manual labour.

chunks.title: This portfolio
chunks.text: Built with Three.js and GSAP — a scroll-driven 3D paper roll where each work experience scrolls into view like a physical roll of paper. The chatbot runs on a Cloudflare Pages Function backed by a knowledge base. No LLM API calls — deterministic keyword retrieval only.
